sections.heading: About Roofing Done Right
body: Roofing Done Right is an owner-operated Santa Rosa roofing company led by Juan Antonio Mejia, who brings roughly ten years of roofing experience to every job. The focus is straightforward: responsive scheduling, careful workmanship, and simple, affordable pricing.

From leak and roof repair to metal roofing, skylight installation, gutter work and roof cleaning, Roofing Done Right serves homeowners across Santa Rosa and Sonoma County. The company is a licensed California roofing contractor (CSLB #1105080), ranked by BuildZoom in the top 5% of the state's contractors, and offers same- or next-day estimates.

items.title: Roof Repair
items.description: Fast, affordable repair of leaks, storm damage and worn roofing for homes across Sonoma County.

items.title: Metal Roofing
items.description: Durable metal roofing installation built to stand up to Sonoma County weather.

items.title: Skylight Installation
items.description: Professional skylight installation that brings in natural light without leaks.

items.title: Gutters & Roof Cleaning
items.description: Gutter repair and cleaning plus full roof cleaning to keep water moving and your roof healthy.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Roofing Done Right and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: I got five bids and Juan's was the best — his personal attention was better than the other four roofers I contacted. Responsive, fast, and a simple, affordable pricing structure.
items.author: Verified Yelp review · Santa Rosa

sections.heading: Work with Roofing Done Right
sections.body: Find us at 2522 Tachevah Dr. Call (707) 791-0494 — we’re glad to help.
